title: U.S. Diesel Prices Top $5 a Gallon as Hormuz Crisis Ripples Across America
summary: U.S. diesel fuel prices topped $5 per gallon, according to GasBuddy, which has only happened once before, Reuters noted in a report, citing the GasBuddy data.
